SEARCH
Package fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.base.connectors

Class PublishingConnector

java.lang.Object
fr.sorbonne_u.components.connectors.AbstractConnector
fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.base.connectors.PublishingConnector
All Implemented Interfaces:
fr.sorbonne_u.components.connectors.ConnectorI, fr.sorbonne_u.components.interfaces.ComponentInterface, fr.sorbonne_u.components.interfaces.OfferedCI, fr.sorbonne_u.components.interfaces.RequiredCI, PublishingCI, Remote
Direct Known Subclasses:
PrivilegedConnector
public class PublishingConnector extends fr.sorbonne_u.components.connectors.AbstractConnector implements PublishingCI
Connecteur reliant un port outbound client PublishingCI au port inbound PublishingCI du broker.

Sens du raccordement : la référence AbstractConnector.offering pointe vers le port inbound du broker qui offre PublishingCI.

les exceptions techniques levées côté offering sont encapsulées dans RemoteException (la CI ne déclare que throws Exception et PublishingCI ne porte aucune exception métier).

  • Method Details

    • publish

      public void publish(String receptionPortURI, String channel, MessageI message) throws Exception
      Description copied from interface: PublishingCI
      asynchronously publish message on channel.

      Contract

       pre    receptionPortURI != null && !receptionPortURI.isEmpty()
 pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 pre    message != null
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Specified by:
      publish in interface PublishingCI
      Parameters:
      receptionPortURI - URI of the inbound port offering the component interface ReceivingCI.
      channel - name of the channel on which message must be published.
      message - message to be published to channel.
      Throws:
      Exception - to do.
      See Also:
      • PublishingCI.publish(String, String, MessageI)

    • publish

      public void publish(String receptionPortURI, String channel, ArrayList<MessageI> messages) throws Exception
      Description copied from interface: PublishingCI
      asynchronously publish all of the messages on channel.

      Contract

       pre    receptionPortURI != null && !receptionPortURI.isEmpty()
 pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 pre    messages != null && messages.size() > 0
 pre    Stream.of(messages).allMatch(m -> m != null)
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Specified by:
      publish in interface PublishingCI
      Parameters:
      receptionPortURI - URI of the inbound port offering the component interface ReceivingCI.
      channel - name of the channel on which message must be published.
      messages - list of messages to be published on channel.
      Throws:
      Exception - to do.
      See Also:
      • PublishingCI.publish(String, String, ArrayList)

    • asyncPublishAndNotify

      public void asyncPublishAndNotify(String receptionPortURI, String channel, MessageI message, String notificationInbounhdPortURI) throws Exception
      Description copied from interface: PublishingCI
      asynchronously publish message on channel and notify the client component if an abnormal termination condition occurred.

      Contract

       pre    receptionPortURI != null && !receptionPortURI.isEmpty()
 pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 pre    message != null
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Specified by:
      asyncPublishAndNotify in interface PublishingCI
      Parameters:
      receptionPortURI - URI of the inbound port offering the component interface ReceivingCI.
      channel - name of the channel on which message must be published.
      message - message to be published to channel.
      notificationInbounhdPortURI - URI of an inbound port offering AbnormalTerminationNotificationCI.
      Throws:
      Exception - to do.
      See Also:
      • PublishingCI.asyncPublishAndNotify(String, String, MessageI, String)

    • asyncPublishAndNotify

      public void asyncPublishAndNotify(String receptionPortURI, String channel, ArrayList<MessageI> messages, String notificationInbounhdPortURI) throws Exception
      Description copied from interface: PublishingCI
      asynchronously publish all of the messages on channel and notify the client component if an abnormal termination condition occurred.

      Contract

       pre    receptionPortURI != null && !receptionPortURI.isEmpty()
 pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 pre    messages != null && messages.size() > 0
 pre    Stream.of(messages).allMatch(m -> m != null)
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Specified by:
      asyncPublishAndNotify in interface PublishingCI
      Parameters:
      receptionPortURI - URI of the inbound port offering the component interface ReceivingCI.
      channel - name of the channel on which message must be published.
      messages - list of messages to be published on channel.
      notificationInbounhdPortURI - URI of an inbound port offering AbnormalTerminationNotificationCI.
      Throws:
